feedback: Strong alignment with current trends in SaaS revenue management.
Clear integration with existing tools like Stripe enhances market appeal.
Milestones are realistic and provide a solid roadmap for development.
ai.summary: The idea presents a clear market need for revenue intelligence in the SaaS sector, with a credible revenue path and achievable builder milestones.

metadata.description: A revenue intelligence product for B2B SaaS companies. It connects Stripe, usage analytics, and customer lifecycle events to detect paid expansion opportunities and revenue proof for investors.
metadata.oneLiner: AI tracks usage and expansion revenue for SaaS teams.
metadata.title: Revenue Copilot for SaaS
